title: Run a Bicep what-if and read the resource delta
description: Execute az deployment what-if and interpret Create/Modify/Delete/NoChange so risky changes surface before an apply.
body: Use when you are about to deploy a Bicep/ARM template. Do not deploy without previewing the change set. Actions: run az deployment group what-if with the template and parameters, read the color-coded output for Create/Modify/Delete/NoChange, scrutinize any Delete or property replacement on stateful resources, and only then deploy in incremental mode. Validation signals include what-if listing only intended changes, no surprise deletions, and an idempotent re-run showing NoChange. Risk boundary: a what-if that shows deletion or replacement of a production resource must be reviewed by a human before deploying.
